roadmaps.label: Frontend
roadmaps.description: Build accessible, responsive, high-performance interfaces and production web applications.

roadmaps.label: Backend
roadmaps.description: Design secure APIs, reliable services, databases, and observable production systems.

roadmaps.label: Full Stack
roadmaps.description: Own complete products from interface and API design to data, testing, and cloud delivery.

roadmaps.label: Python
roadmaps.description: Master Python from syntax and automation to APIs, data work, testing, and production projects.

roadmaps.label: Java
roadmaps.description: Build robust object-oriented applications and scalable Spring Boot services.

roadmaps.label: C
roadmaps.description: Understand memory, low-level programming, systems fundamentals, and reliable C software.

roadmaps.label: C++
roadmaps.description: Create high-performance software with modern C++, strong ownership, and systems design.

roadmaps.label: JavaScript
roadmaps.description: Master the language of the web from fundamentals to asynchronous and production-grade applications.

roadmaps.label: React
roadmaps.description: Build accessible, testable React applications with modern state, data, and performance patterns.

roadmaps.label: Next.js
roadmaps.description: Ship full-stack React products with routing, server rendering, data, auth, and deployment.

roadmaps.label: Node.js
roadmaps.description: Build scalable JavaScript services using Node's runtime, streams, workers, and ecosystem.

roadmaps.label: Express.js
roadmaps.description: Create secure, maintainable Express APIs with validation, testing, and production operations.

roadmaps.label: MongoDB
roadmaps.description: Model, query, secure, and operate document databases for modern applications.

roadmaps.label: SQL
roadmaps.description: Query, model, tune, and protect relational data for analytics and production systems.

roadmaps.label: Data Analytics
roadmaps.description: Turn messy business data into reliable analysis, dashboards, experiments, and decisions.

roadmaps.label: Data Science
roadmaps.description: Investigate data, run experiments, build predictive models, and deliver trusted data products.

roadmaps.label: Machine Learning
roadmaps.description: Develop, evaluate, deploy, and monitor reliable machine learning systems.

roadmaps.label: Artificial Intelligence
roadmaps.description: Build useful and responsible intelligent products with ML, language models, retrieval, and agents.

roadmaps.label: Deep Learning
roadmaps.description: Train, optimize, evaluate, and deploy neural networks for language, vision, and multimodal tasks.

roadmaps.label: Cyber Security
roadmaps.description: Defend systems through networking, secure design, ethical testing, detection, and incident response.

roadmaps.label: Cloud Computing
roadmaps.description: Design secure, resilient, cost-aware systems across compute, storage, networking, and managed services.

roadmaps.label: AWS
roadmaps.description: Build and operate secure, resilient AWS architectures with automation and cost control.

roadmaps.label: Azure
roadmaps.description: Deliver enterprise cloud systems on Azure with identity, networking, automation, and observability.

roadmaps.label: DevOps
roadmaps.description: Automate delivery, infrastructure, reliability, and feedback loops across software teams.

roadmaps.label: Docker
roadmaps.description: Package, secure, network, and operate reproducible containerized applications.

roadmaps.label: Kubernetes
roadmaps.description: Deploy and operate resilient container platforms with secure, observable Kubernetes workloads.

roadmaps.label: UI/UX
roadmaps.description: Research, structure, prototype, validate, and communicate inclusive digital product experiences.

roadmaps.label: Figma
roadmaps.description: Create responsive interfaces, prototypes, component systems, and developer-ready design handoffs.

roadmaps.label: Android
roadmaps.description: Build modern native Android applications with Kotlin, Compose, architecture, testing, and release workflows.

roadmaps.label: Flutter
roadmaps.description: Create polished cross-platform apps with Dart, Flutter widgets, robust state, and native integrations.

roadmaps.label: React Native
roadmaps.description: Build maintainable iOS and Android applications with React Native, Expo, and native capabilities.

roadmaps.label: Game Development
roadmaps.description: Design and ship engaging games with gameplay programming, physics, assets, optimization, and publishing.

roadmaps.label: Blockchain
roadmaps.description: Build secure decentralized applications with cryptography, smart contracts, testing, and protocol awareness.

roadmaps.label: SaaS Development
roadmaps.description: Validate, build, monetize, operate, and grow a secure multi-tenant software product.

roadmaps.label: Product Management
roadmaps.description: Discover valuable problems, align teams, make evidence-based decisions, and deliver measurable outcomes.

roadmaps.label: Digital Marketing
roadmaps.description: Acquire, convert, and retain audiences using content, search, paid media, analytics, and experimentation.

roadmaps.label: System Design
roadmaps.description: Reason about scalable, reliable distributed systems and communicate explicit engineering tradeoffs.

roadmaps.label: DSA
roadmaps.description: Solve problems systematically with efficient data structures, algorithms, and complexity analysis.

roadmaps.label: Competitive Programming
roadmaps.description: Build speed, precision, and algorithmic depth for contests and advanced technical interviews.

roadmaps.label: iOS
roadmaps.description: Build polished native Apple applications with Swift, SwiftUI, structured data, testing, and App Store delivery.

roadmaps.label: AR/VR
roadmaps.description: Create immersive spatial experiences with 3D interaction, tracking, performance, and human-centered XR design.

roadmaps.label: Embedded Systems
roadmaps.description: Engineer reliable firmware and connected devices from electronics and C to RTOS, protocols, testing, and production.

roadmaps.label: QA Engineering
roadmaps.description: Build confidence in software through risk-based testing, automation, performance checks, and quality engineering.
